stemHtml: A noise-abatement runway has full ILS CAT I, dry surface, calm wind, 5000 m vis, 5000 ft ceiling. This runway can...

options.a: still be used with a LOC-only approach.
options.b: be refused by the PIC for safety reasons.
options.c: no longer be used if vis drops to 2500 m.
options.d: no longer be used if ceiling drops to 2500 ft.
